text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Attention! I hereby announce the commencement
of the Tracen Concentration Card Game Tourney!
The grand prize is one coupon for a special meat
lover's course, brought to you by the cafeteria
staff!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I shall claim victory—for Brian's sake and mine!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is matching cards masterfully in a
display of incredible memory! Even Special Week
might be outmatched!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...I can't give up! Meat... Meat...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Spe! After you win, we're gonna throw a
meat fiesta to make up for the meal you missed!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...! The match for this card is riiiiight... here!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Special Week has found yet another pair in
just one try!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Lady Luck must really be on her side to keep
matching up cards that haven't even been turned
over once yet.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Or maybe she's just crazy focused from hunger.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you're that trainer from the other day. Sorry,
but spare me the small talk.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I'm up against Spe next. And the round's about to start, so...

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And now we enter the long-awaited finals! Give it
up for Special Week, who's defeated formidable
opponents one after another to make it here! Will
her final challenger meet the same fate?

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text: You got this, Spe! Keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uuugh! M-my stomach...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you've used up quite a bit of
brainpower. ...Care for a piece of candy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so the finals begin, if in a somewhat less than
dramatic fashion!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And they're at it! Special Week has her eyes
closed! Is she going to use that special power of
hers again?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Meat... Meat... Meat!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's this one! ...Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
What a shocker! Special Week has failed to match
the cards for the first time today! What happened
to all that momentum from earlier?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: No way! Wh-where'd all my luck go?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
What? Not enough sugar to concentrate? I have
more candy, if ya want.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Groan... Thank you. Sigh... What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Special Week is unable to get back in
the groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Festa emerges the victor and receives
the grand prize.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! This is the coupon for the special meat
lover's course... You're really giving this to me?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You betcha. Just my way of sayin' thanks for all
the fun. See ya 'rou—

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, looks like we got an audience. I can't say
peepin's a respectable pastime.
choice_data_list: Was that a... bribe just now?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Huhhh?! Don't be ridiculous! As if I'd ever dream
of cheating!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want the prize, so I threw her a bone. All I
really wanted was to throw a wrench in the
machine.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That's right. You're as stubborn as they come,
aren't ya? ...Fine. Listen up, 'cause I'm only gonna
explain this once.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Do you remember that habit that Spe has?
choice_data_list:
You mean closing her eyes before flipping the
cards?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Not only that, but then she'd say things to
make herself even hungrier.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You know, like, "Meat... I want to eat meat..." Yadda,
yadda.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Now, I dunno if it was on purpose or not, but El
mentioned Spe had missed a meal. I bet she
hadn't eaten since breakfast. She must've been
starvin'.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
As she got hungrier and hungrier, her gut instincts
got sharper and sharper. That's exactly what led
to her bout of good luck.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
So I think to myself, what if we were to take care
of that hunger? With, say, I dunno... a piece of
candy.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Things get a little out of whack. A cog jams in the
machine. A hint of distress starts to eat away at
those gut instincts which have been drawing out
such insane luck.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Relyin' on luck is for suckers. Sometimes you
gotta use your noggin.
